data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of switching modality (in-person to remote if sick), but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions a scenario where a student switches to virtual due to illness, but it does not provide concrete evidence of the system's capability to facilitate this switch in practice. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the system's ability to switch modality from in-person to remote if a participant is sick.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
